title: Bunger! (Cobblemon)
description: puts the funny burger guy into funny cube monster mod (but updated!!)
body:
i lost the password to my old account so i'm reuploading this here

adds bunger from bugsnax into cobblemon

they mostly spawn in most places

all models made by me (poorly)

has a shiny form

drops bread n steak when slain

put it in both resource pack and datapack folders

- added sfx! (thanks to Lukey1028 on discord for adding the sounds)
